name: Sausage Skillet
recipeIngredient: 4 Red potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
4 Italian-style sausages, cut into 1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cover the potatoes and sausage with water. Bring to a boil, then simmer, covered, until the sausage is fully cooked, about 20 minutes.
2. Drain off the water. Add the vegetables to the pot of potatoes and sausage in a frying pan.
3. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve immediately.
